title: acalypha oligantha
intro: Acalypha oligantha, also known as the Small Copper Leaf, is a flowering plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Acalypha oligantha are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
